title: Claim
description: The audit spine. Every assertion that can reach a memo is a claim. fact claims must carry a source + verbatim quote; inference claims must reference the verified claims they build on.

id.description: Stable unique id for this claim (e.g. c0001).

type.description: fact = directly grounded in a source quote. inference = reasoning built on other verified claims.

supports.description: claim ids this inference is built on. Experts may only build on status:verified claims.

source_ids.description: source ids in the source_registry that ground this fact.

quote.description: Verbatim span from the source that supports the statement. Checked literally by the verifier.

locator.description: Where in the source the quote lives (e.g. '424B3 > Background of the Merger > p.42' or a section/figure ref for filings).

module.description: Which pipeline module produced the claim.

area.description: Coverage-checklist area key this claim belongs to (e.g. 'target_fundamentals', 'antitrust_regulatory'). Drives the coverage map's searched/hits/gaps report.

status.description: Set by the deterministic verifier. unverified until checked; quarantined never reaches the memo.

verification.description: Audit trail written by the verifier hook.
